title: Uniface Database Utilities
text: Uniface Database Utilities Uniface has utilities that can be used to generate DBMS-specific SQL scripts to preare a supported database for applicatoin data or the Uniface Repository. For some databases, it is possible to load database definitions into a Uniface application model, facilitating application development for existing databases. Support for these utilities varies with the database. For more information, see Supported Uniface Database Facilities . To copy data between databases you can use Uniface's data copy facilities provided by Uniface. For more information, see Data Copy Facility . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
